name: Mubarak Mandi Palace
description: A grand, sprawling royal palace complex that served as the principal residence of the Dogra Kings. It boasts a unique blend of Rajasthani, Mughal, and European architecture.
history: The oldest building in the complex dates back to 1824. The complex once housed the famed Golden Bow and Arrow of Emperor Shah Jahan.
famousFor: Royal Dogra history, mixed architecture, Dogra Art Museum.
